Notice Of Motion To Compel The Deposition Of The Ucsf Custodian Of Records And To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS REBECCA BARGANS, ANNETTE BUMGARNER'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF THE UCSF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AND TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS.
Appearances: J. Julia Hansen of Hassard Bonnington LLP (288.9800) for defendant and responding party; Douglas C. Fladseth of the Law Offices of Douglas C. Fladseth (707.545.2600) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving parties.
Judge Kahn made a personal disclosure and no objections were raised. Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: granted in part. The deposition of UCSF's Custodian of Records already took place. Defendants shall provide further responses to requests for admissions 1 and by December 2, 2011. The objections to requests 1 and 2 are stricken. The response to request 2 is evasive, further response required. All requests for sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order for the court to sign today. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
